facebook.overlay_text:
0.01 seconds matters.
Jaked performance swimwear.
velocx.co.nz
facebook.caption:
Most swimmers spend years perfecting their stroke — then race in a suit that fights them every metre. 🧪

Drag isn't only about technique. Loose fabric creates turbulence. Poor compression lets your core lose form in the final 25m. Every bit of drag you eliminate is energy your lungs don't have to pay for.

Here's what elite-level race fabric actually does:
👉 **Compression panels** hold body position through the stroke, reducing hull drag
👉 **Hydrophobic construction** sheds water instead of absorbing it — a wet suit is a heavy suit
👉 **Engineered seam placement** stops the suit shifting under race pressure

Jaked suits are built to this standard — engineered in Italy, trusted by competitive swimmers who've felt the real difference between a training suit and a race suit.

Shop the Jaked range at velocx.co.nz — what difference has upgrading your suit made to your race times?
facebook.engagement_bait: Drop a 🔥 if you've ever raced in a proper compression suit and felt the difference.
